no_more_news: No hay noticias nuevas por ahora.
author: Autor
search_external_hint: Found {n} more stories from other sources.
onb_icons_b:
⭐️ — importance score
📂 — theme
📡 — source count
📰 — post count
❤️ — interesting (your ranking)
👎 — not interesting (hide)
⭐ — save
📖 — details

Feed — unread from your channels.
Search — ask in plain language.
Trends — hottest today.
Settings — themes, digests, DND, timezone.
about_body: Briefly collects events from your Telegram channels, deduplicates them, and surfaces what matters.
tz_custom_hint: Enter a timezone, e.g. Europe/Moscow or Asia/Yekaterinburg
about_text: ℹ️ About Briefly is a smart news feed from your Telegram channels: events, themes, search and personalization.
search_examples: p. ej. qué hay de nuevo de NVIDIA esta semana
search_empty: No se encontraron noticias relevantes para tu consulta.
del_acc_intro:
This cannot be undone for the selected data.

Choose what to delete:
del_acc_data_hint:
History, favorites, reactions and settings.
Your channels stay — the feed keeps working.
del_acc_channels_hint:
Everything above, plus your channel list is unlinked.
Channel records stay in the database.
del_acc_purge_hint:
Channels are removed from the database only if nobody else follows them.
Channels shared with other users are kept.
del_acc_confirm_body: To continue, type one of these words in the chat: delete or yes Any other text cancels deletion.
del_acc_done_data: Account data cleared. You can start over.
del_acc_done_full: Account removed from the database, channels unlinked. Use /start to begin again.
del_acc_done_purge: Account removed. Unique channels deleted from the database (shared ones kept). /start creates a new account.
channels_hint: Envía @usernames o enlaces — uno por línea.
feed_processing: Canales conectados. Las noticias aparecen tras el worker.
no_channels_feed: Añade canales para crear tu feed personal.
no_channels_trends: Añade canales para ver tus tendencias.
empty_feed_body:
We're still watching your sources.

Try:
ob_welcome_cta: Let's set everything up in a couple of minutes ✨
ob_privacy_agree: By using Briefly you agree to:
ob_privacy_data: processing data needed to run the service
ob_channels_body:
Briefly collects news from Telegram channels.
Add the ones you want to follow.
ob_sources_collect: Briefly will start collecting news now.
ob_tour1_b:
Your main stories live here.
Open details or swipe further.
ob_tour2_b: The most discussed stories of the last hours.
ob_tour3_b:
Ask in plain language.

Example:
“What's new with iPhone?”
ob_tour4_b: Mark what you like so Briefly learns your taste.
ob_done_soon: Your first digest will appear soon.
howto_body: 🍓 Briefly 📰 Feed Top stories from your sources. 🔥 Trends What's discussed most. 🔎 Search Find news by meaning. ⭐ Reactions Tune your feed. 📡 Sources Manage channels.
load_news_hint: Elige un periodo — el worker traerá el historial de tus canales activos.
backfill_queued: 📥 Carga de {days} días en cola para {n} canal(es).
backfill_queued_add: 📥 Cargando los últimos 2 días — progreso abajo.
trends_empty: Aún no hay tendencias de tus canales.
hist_search_ask: Escribe una palabra para buscar en el historial:
onb_1_b:
El feed muestra lo importante.
Abre Detalles para leer una a una.
onb_2_b: Pregunta en lenguaje natural — respuesta corta y fuentes.
onb_3_b: Añade canales en lista con @username o enlaces.
deep_searching: 🔬 Deep Search — refining from found events…
privacy_body: Guardamos: ID de Telegram, canales, reacciones, historial y ajustes.\nSolo para personalizar el feed. No se vende a terceros.\nPuedes restablecer reacciones o eliminar tu cuenta en Ajustes → Eliminar cuenta.
